invoicing.bannerText: This is a preview of invoicing and payments.
invoicing.title: Invoicing & Payments Demo
invoicing.subtitle: Professional invoices, online payments, and automatic reminders
invoicing.clickToSee: Click an invoice to see details
invoicing.paymentDesc: Customers can pay online with one click. Funds deposit in 1-2 business days.
invoicing.getPaidFasterDesc: Businesses using ToolTime Pro get paid 3x faster with online invoicing.
invoicing.stopChasingDesc: Create professional invoices in seconds, accept credit cards and ACH, and let automatic reminders do the follow-up for you. Get paid faster with less effort.

reviews.subtitle: Automate 5-star review requests after every job
reviews.googleLinkHint: Get your link from Google Business Profile > Share > Ask for reviews
reviews.autoSendLabel: Automatically send review requests when jobs are marked complete
reviews.conversionDesc: {percent}% of customers who received a request left a review
reviews.allCaughtUpDesc: All completed jobs have been sent review requests
reviews.automateDesc: Stop chasing customers for reviews. Jenny automatically sends SMS review requests after every completed job, helping you build your online reputation on autopilot.

scheduling.bannerText: This is a preview of the smart scheduling system.
scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling Demo
scheduling.subtitle: See how ToolTime Pro helps you manage jobs, crews, and customer appointments
scheduling.syncCalendarDesc: Connect Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar to avoid double-bookings.
scheduling.takeControlDesc: Stop double-booking and missing appointments. ToolTime Pro's smart scheduler syncs with your calendar, sends automatic reminders, and lets customers book online 24/7.

shield.bannerText: Preview of ToolTime Shield — CA Compliance & HR Tools.
shield.title: ToolTime Shield Demo
shield.subtitle: California compliance tools, worker classification, and HR document library
shield.goodStandingDesc: You're doing well! Complete the remaining items to reach 100% compliance.
shield.caChecklistDesc: Track your compliance with California employment laws
shield.quizDesc: Answer these questions to help determine if your worker should be classified as an employee or independent contractor.
shield.reviewRecommendedDesc: Based on your answers, this worker may need to be classified as an Employee. We recommend consulting with an employment attorney to confirm.
shield.caLawNote: California uses the ABC test which presumes workers are employees unless the hiring entity can prove all three conditions of the test.
shield.calcDesc: Calculate final wages owed to terminated employees under California law.
shield.caLawFinalPay: If an employee is fired, final pay (including unused PTO) must be provided immediately. Waiting time penalties of up to 30 days' wages may apply for late payment.
shield.protectBusinessDesc: ToolTime Shield helps you stay compliant with California employment law, avoid costly lawsuits, and manage HR tasks with ease. Included in all ToolTime Pro plans.

0.title: Lead Capture

1.title: Natural Conversation

2.title: Instant Quotes
2.description: Provides price ranges and schedules estimates based on your configured pricing.

3.title: Appointment Booking
3.description: Books appointments directly into your calendar, sends confirmation texts automatically.

4.title: Emergency Handling

5.title: Bilingual Support

phoneReceptionist.ctaDescription: Jenny Pro answers every call professionally, captures lead details, and books appointments — even at 2 AM. Start your free trial today.
phoneReceptionist.ctaFootnote: Included with Pro plan ($79/mo) and Elite plan ($129/mo)

quickbooks.demoBanner: This is a preview of QuickBooks Sync
quickbooks.title: QuickBooks Sync
quickbooks.subtitle: Two-way sync your invoices, payments, and customers with QuickBooks Online
quickbooks.connectToStart: Connect your QuickBooks account to get started

0.title: Automatic Two-Way Sync
0.description: Invoices, payments, and customer data sync automatically between ToolTime Pro and QuickBooks in real time.

1.title: Accurate Reporting
1.description: Keep your books accurate without manual data entry. Every transaction flows to QuickBooks automatically.

2.title: Payment Reconciliation
2.description: Payments collected through ToolTime Pro are automatically matched to invoices in QuickBooks.

3.title: Customer Sync
3.description: New customers created in ToolTime Pro are automatically added to QuickBooks, and vice versa.

4.title: Tax-Ready Reports
4.description: All your revenue and expense data is organized in QuickBooks, making tax time a breeze.

5.title: Secure Connection
5.description: Bank-level encryption keeps your financial data safe. Intuit-certified integration you can trust.

0.q: Which version of QuickBooks is supported?
0.a: ToolTime Pro syncs with QuickBooks Online (all plans). QuickBooks Desktop is not currently supported.

1.a: Syncs happen automatically in real time when changes occur. You can also trigger a manual sync at any time.

2.a: No. Our smart matching ensures invoices, payments, and customers are never duplicated across systems.

3.q: Can I disconnect at any time?
3.a: Yes. Disconnecting stops future syncs but preserves all data already in both systems.

quickbooks.ctaDescription: Connect QuickBooks in one click and let ToolTime Pro handle the bookkeeping. Your accountant will thank you.
quickbooks.ctaFootnote: QuickBooks Sync add-on: $12/mo. Available on all plans.

routeOptimization.demoBanner: This is a preview of Route Optimization
routeOptimization.title: Route Optimization
routeOptimization.subtitle: Save time, fuel, and money with AI-powered route planning
routeOptimization.fitMoreJobs: Fit More Jobs in Every Day

0.title: Save on Fuel
0.description: Reduce fuel costs by up to 30% with shorter, smarter routes between job sites.

1.title: Save Time
1.description: Cut drive time significantly so your crew can complete more jobs each day.

2.title: Reduce Emissions
2.description: Fewer miles driven means a smaller carbon footprint for your business.

3.title: Happier Customers
3.description: Arrive on time with accurate ETAs. Customers get notified automatically.

4.title: Mobile Friendly
4.description: Optimized routes are sent directly to your drivers' phones with turn-by-turn navigation.

5.title: Auto Re-Optimize
5.description: Routes update automatically when jobs are added, cancelled, or rescheduled throughout the day.

routeOptimization.ctaTitle: Stop Wasting Time on the Road
routeOptimization.ctaDescription: Route optimization pays for itself in fuel savings alone. Elite plan customers save an average of $400/month.
